* \[[`3daff728b8`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/3daff728b8)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix**: tolerate non-string span event names and whitespace-suffixed step functions JSON (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8358](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8358)
